tier_definitions.1: HIGH conversion risk + HIGH phone confidence — top priority cold call
tier_definitions.2: HIGH conversion risk + MEDIUM/LOW phone confidence — call with caution
tier_definitions.3: MEDIUM conversion risk + HIGH phone confidence — solid call, looser hook
tier_definitions.4: LOW conversion risk + verified phone — warm conversation
tier_definitions.no_phone: No verified phone — email/LinkedIn or research path
